title: God, The Nations Have Invaded

verses.text: They have poured out blood like water All around Jerusalem. There was no one there to bury All the bodies of the dead. We’ve become to all our neighbors a derision and reproach. We are scorned by those who mock us, Those who now on us encroach.

Lord, how long? Will your displeasure Carry on and never tire? Will your jealous anger burn, Lord, like an all-consuming fire? Pour your fury on the nations That reject your holy name, All the kingdoms which devour and Shatter Jacob’s dwelling place.

Lord, remember not against us All our sins of long ago; May your mercy quickly meet us You have brought us very low. Help us, God of our salvation, For the glory of your name. For your name’s sake come and save us, Cover all our sin and shame.

Why should nations all around us Come and say, “Where is your God?” Let the nations know your vengeance For your servants’ outpoured blood. May the groans of ev’ry pris’ner Come before your throne on high; And according to your power Save all those condemned to die.

Lord, reward our taunting neighbours, For they treated you with scorn; In their laps, O Lord, deliver Sev’n fold judgment in return Then shall we, your sheep, your people, Give you thanks forevermore, And thro’ ev’ry generation Your unending praise record.
